result.finding: The application uses a minimal 2-profile Spring setup: a default profile (application.properties, using H2 in-memory with MySQL as the target database config) and a 'mysql' profile (application-mysql.properties) that activates the real MySQL database connection via environment variables. No dev/test/staging/prod profiles exist.
evidence: application.properties: base configuration with database=mysql and H2/MySQL schema paths
application-mysql.properties: MySQL-specific datasource configuration with MYSQL_HOST, MYSQL_PORT, MYSQL_DATABASE, MYSQL_USERNAME, MYSQL_PASSWORD environment variables
No application-dev.properties, application-test.properties, application-staging.properties, or application-prod.properties found
No @Profile annotations in any source Java class
pom.xml has one Maven profile 'css' for CSS compilation only — not environment-related
No docker-compose or Kubernetes environment-specific configuration found
values: Activation: Spring profile 'mysql' must be activated via --spring.profiles.active=mysql or SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=mysql
